_metadata.description: Sample chunks as returned by Searcher.search() before context formatting
_metadata.created_for: golden-file snapshot fixtures for RAG pipeline

chunks.chunk_text: Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readable syntax and versatility. It supports multiple programming paradigms including procedural, object-oriented, and functional programming.

Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed. Common algorithms include decision trees, neural networks, and support vector machines.
The SecondBrain CLI tool provides semantic search over documents using MongoDB vector search and OpenAI-compatible embedding APIs. It supports ingestion of PDF, DOCX, PPTX, and other formats.

expected_formatted_context:
Source: programming_languages.pdf (page 1)
Python is a high-level, interpreted programming language known for its readable syntax and versatility. It supports multiple programming paradigms including procedural, object-oriented, and functional programming.

Source: ml_intro.pdf (page 3)
Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed. Common algorithms include decision trees, neural networks, and support vector machines.

Source: secondbrain_docs.pdf (page 1)
The SecondBrain CLI tool provides semantic search over documents using MongoDB vector search and OpenAI-compatible embedding APIs. It supports ingestion of PDF, DOCX, PPTX, and other formats.
